compiled_state.title: EV-3a: core config-backed env renames (compact/scratch/mcp-jira-sync)
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart
compiled_state.description:
## What
Core config-backed env-var renames (slice of EV-3 / 15f6): route three readers through the typed Config so the canonical override is the REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY> name (which equals the config key) and the OLD unprefixed/legacy name is honored as a deprecation alias with a warning. These keys already exist in the typed Config (252e); this wires the readers + aliases.

## Scope / Deliverables
- COMPACT_THRESHOLD -> REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD (config compact.threshold): src/rebar/_commands/compact.py reads load_config().compact.threshold; legacy COMPACT_THRESHOLD aliased.
- SCRATCH_BASE_DIR -> REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR (config scratch.base_dir): src/rebar/_engine_support/reads.py + src/rebar/_commands/scratch.py read load_config().scratch.base_dir; legacy SCRATCH_BASE_DIR aliased.
- REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE -> REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC (config mcp.allow_jira_sync): src/rebar/mcp_server.py gate reads the canonical name; legacy REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE aliased.
- Add legacy aliases to config._LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES (compact/scratch) and to the mcp gate; deprecation warning on old-name use; add old names to config._env_signature where they feed load_config.

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Each renamed: canonical REBAR_ name honored via the typed Config + old name aliased with a deprecation warning
- [ ] Precedence preserved (CLI/flag > env > config file > default); MCP gate fail-safe semantics unchanged (default off)
- [ ] Tests for each rename + alias; full non-integration suite green

comments.body: DONE (config-loop, commit 06fd4d94). Three core settings now resolve through the typed Config with canonical REBAR_<SECTION>_<KEY> override + old-name deprecation alias (warning) + config-file path. (1) COMPACT_THRESHOLD->REBAR_COMPACT_THRESHOLD (compact.threshold): compact.py reads load_config().compact.threshold; --threshold= flag still overrides; ConfigError propagates (explicit command = loud). (2) SCRATCH_BASE_DIR->REBAR_SCRATCH_BASE_DIR (scratch.base_dir): scratch.base_dir() + reads._load_scratch() read load_config().scratch.base_dir, fail-safe to default path on malformed config (best-effort infra; reads passes explicit root to avoid git subprocess). (3) REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_RECONCILE_LIVE->REBAR_MCP_ALLOW_JIRA_SYNC (mcp.allow_jira_sync): new mcp_server._allow_jira_sync() reads load_config().mcp.allow_jira_sync, fail-SAFE off on ConfigError/garbage (preserves old _env_truthy gate semantics: bad value->off, never fail open); gate message + docstrings updated. Aliases added to config._LEGACY_ENV_ALIASES; old names added to _env_signature (cache invalidation). ACs met: each renamed canonical + old aliased with warning; precedence preserved (CLI>env>file>default; canonical-wins over alias); MCP gate fail-safe default-off unchanged. Tests (8 new): canonical/alias/canonical-wins/config-file for compact + scratch consumer + mcp gate (default off, alias enables, garbage fail-safe); existing test_mcp.py still green via the alias. Full offline suite green: 1939 passed, 9 skipped. Subagent review: clean, NO critical/major (2 minor non-blocking notes: mcp gate config-file path is cwd-sensitive [intended], test resets are belt-and-suspenders). Verify gate untouched. Parent 15f6 still blocked by EV-3b (TICKETS_TRACKER_DIR) + EV-3c (reconciler/LLM + id-guard flip).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
